message:
feat(fp-types): Timedelta arithmetic ops (br-frankenpandas-4r56 Phase 1)

Closes br-frankenpandas-4r56 Phase 1. Exposes Timedelta arithmetic as pub fns on the existing Timedelta namespace, covering the Phase 1 scope of the 4r56 parity gap (TZ-aware datetime is Phase 2+ with a Timestamp struct + chrono_tz integration).

Arithmetic ops added (all NaT-propagating + saturating on overflow):
- Timedelta::add(a, b) -> i64
- Timedelta::sub(a, b) -> i64
- Timedelta::neg(a) -> i64
- Timedelta::abs(a) -> i64
- Timedelta::mul_scalar(a, factor) -> i64
- Timedelta::div_scalar(a, divisor) -> i64 (pandas/Python floor division, not Rust trunc-toward-zero or div_euclid — both diverge from pandas for negative divisors)
- Timedelta::div_timedelta(a, b) -> f64 (ratio, NaN on NaT, Inf on zero divisor)

Key semantic notes captured in doc-comments:
- Rust  truncates toward zero;  keeps remainder non-negative. Neither matches pandas  for negative divisors. div_scalar does a trunc-to-floor adjustment (detect opposite-sign remainder, subtract 1).
- NaT == i64::MIN; the NaT-propagation branch subsumes the  overflow case.

14 new unit tests covering: sum/subtract non-NaT, NaT propagation on all ops, saturating overflow on add/mul, sign flip for neg, magnitude for abs, floor-division parity across the 4 sign combinations, zero-divisor returns NaT, NaT aliases i64::MIN, float-ratio semantics.

rch: cargo test -p fp-types --lib timedelta_ (27 pass total incl. pre-existing parse/format), cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean, cargo clippy -p fp-types --all-targets -D warnings clean, ubs exit 0.

Phase 2 (Timestamp struct + TZ-aware ops via chrono_tz) and Phase 3 (live-oracle fixtures for dt arithmetic across DST) remain follow-up slices.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

-{"id":"frankenpandas-4r56","title":"[MEDIUM] parity: Timedelta arithmetic + TZ-aware datetime ops","description":"Parity-gap audit: datetime + Timedelta arithmetic, TZ-aware operations.

**Scope.** pandas:
- Timestamp + Timedelta → Timestamp.
- Timestamp - Timestamp → Timedelta.
- Timedelta + Timedelta → Timedelta.
- Timedelta * scalar → Timedelta.
- tz-aware: `pd.Timestamp('2024-01-01', tz='US/Eastern') + pd.Timedelta(days=1)` stays in the same tz.
- DST transitions: adding 1 day across a spring-forward boundary changes wall-clock hour but preserves absolute duration.

**FrankenPandas state.** fp-types has `Timedelta` namespace with NANOS_PER_* constants + parse(). No Timestamp type surfaced publicly; datetime values live as Utf8-encoded ISO 8601 strings per README Limitations.

Gaps (from README + existing DISCREPANCIES):
- No native Timestamp dtype → TZ-aware arithmetic not possible.
- Timedelta arithmetic: `Timedelta + Timedelta` not exposed as a pub fn; only internals.
- Scalar::Timedelta64 exists but no `Scalar::Timestamp` / `Scalar::DatetimeTz`.

**Severity.** MEDIUM — datetime handling is pandas's foundational surface; partial coverage limits financial/time-series workflows. chrono-tz is already a workspace dep per Cargo.toml inspection, so IANA tz data is available.

**Fix shape.** Phased:
- Phase 1: expose Timedelta + Timedelta arithmetic as pub fns in fp-types.
- Phase 2: add Timestamp struct (i64 nanos since Unix epoch, optional chrono_tz::Tz).
- Phase 3: live-oracle fixtures for dt arithmetic: Timestamp + Timedelta, Timestamp - Timestamp, tz-aware shift across DST, leap-second handling.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"cc-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T02:12:19.958740286Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T02:14:08.379332198Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["datetime","parity-gap","review","timedelta","tz"]}

- DST transitions: adding 1 day across a spring-forward boundary changes wall-clock hour but preserves absolute duration.

**FrankenPandas state.** fp-types has `Timedelta` namespace with NANOS_PER_* constants + parse(). No Timestamp type surfaced publicly; datetime values live as Utf8-encoded ISO 8601 strings per README Limitations.

Gaps (from README + existing DISCREPANCIES):

- Timedelta arithmetic: `Timedelta + Timedelta` not exposed as a pub fn; only internals.
- Scalar::Timedelta64 exists but no `Scalar::Timestamp` / `Scalar::DatetimeTz`.

**Severity.** MEDIUM — datetime handling is pandas's foundational surface; partial coverage limits financial/time-series workflows. chrono-tz is already a workspace dep per Cargo.toml inspection, so IANA tz data is available.

**Fix shape.** Phased:

- Phase 2: add Timestamp struct (i64 nanos since Unix epoch, optional chrono_tz::Tz).
- Phase 3: live-oracle fixtures for dt arithmetic: Timestamp + Timedelta, Timestamp - Timestamp, tz-aware shift across DST, leap-second handling.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"cc-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T02:12:19.958740286Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T02:20:08.283613382Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T02:20:08.281014037Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["datetime","parity-gap","review","timedelta","tz"]}

Agents fixing fp-io and fp-groupby.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-17T23:34:53.669968299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-17T23:53:03.676385833Z","closed_at":"2026-04-17T23:53:03.674464426Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-52lj","title":"pandas: Series.reset_index(drop=False) DataFrame-return parity","description":"py signature:
pd.Series([1,2], name="x").reset_index(drop=False) -> DataFrame with index + value columns

Current fp-frame rejects this path in crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs around Series::reset_index(): the method returns CompatibilityRejected with a hint to call to_frame()?.reset_index(false) instead of matching pandas directly. Add native parity for the drop=false widening case, including unnamed-series column naming and index-name collision behavior.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T16:56:14.120578035Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T17:51:23.590318907Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T17:51:23.588461529Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
